source.title: Just three companies dominated the $189B in VC investments last month
source.summary: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Waymo dominated global VC activity in February 2026, accounting for the lion's share of a record $189 billion in venture capital investments. AI startups overall captured $171 billion — roughly 90% of all capital raised — in what Crunchbase called a stunning, record-breaking month for AI investment.
